name: font-bigger-prototype
description: Tune matplotlib figure styles from VS Code and rebuild LaTeX PDFs on save.

commands.title: Font Bigger: Open Active Figure Script
Font Bigger: Open Figure Script In VS Code
Font Bigger: Run Figure + LaTeX Pipeline
Font Bigger: Create Compatible Copy From Existing Script

fontBigger.registryFile.description: Relative path to the figure registry JSON file.

fontBigger.plotScript.description: Relative path to the Python plotting script.

fontBigger.mainTexFile.description: Relative path to the main TeX file.

fontBigger.pythonCommand.description: Command used to run the Python plotting script.

fontBigger.latexCommand.description: Optional LaTeX build command. When empty, latexmk is used automatically.

fontBigger.compileBackend.description: LaTeX compile backend. Use overleaf-workshop for Overleaf local replicas, latex-workshop for local LaTeX Workshop projects, direct for built-in latexmk execution, or auto to prefer installed editor integrations.

fontBigger.runOnSave.description: Run the figure + LaTeX pipeline automatically when the active figure script is saved.
